description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, light gray exterior. The front face has two large doors on either side, each with a subtle cutout handle at the top for easy opening, and two open shelves in the center for display or storage. The cabinet stands on four angled wooden legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic and elevating it off the ground. The surfaces are flat and unadorned, emphasizing clean lines and functionality. The open shelving in the center provides easy access to stored items, while the closed compartments offer concealed storage. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for use in urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or residential living spaces.
description: A modern, light gray sideboard cabinet with two doors, central open shelves, and angled wooden legs. Its minimalist design features clean lines and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large doors with cutout handles and two open central shelves, supported by angled wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, unadorned panel and the profile of the angled wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, featureless back panel and the back legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid panel and angled legs.
